name: config_linter
full_help:
config_linter

Description: 
Set configuration of RTL Linter

Syntax: 
config_linter  [-rule <arg>] [-severity <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name         Description
  ------------------------
  [-rule]      Linter Rule ID
  [-severity]  Severity of Linter Rules, valid values are WARNING, 
               CRITICAL_WARNING and ERROR
               Default: WARNING
  [-quiet]     Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]   Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Tools

arguments.description: Severity of Linter Rules, valid values are WARNING, CRITICAL_WARNING and ERROR Default: WARNING
Suspend message limits during command execution
